Growth driven by festive demand, affordability, and user expansion.

news.title:
ETERNAL saw a BSE block trade of ~98.9M shares at Rs 247.05.
The total transaction value of the trade was Rs 2,443.2 crore.
news.summary:

news.title:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.

news.title:
Zomato reported a 21.3% rise in gross order value in Dec quarter.
Swiggy saw slightly slower growth at 20.5%, both exceeding 20% after several quarters.
news.summary:
Zomato reported a 21.3% rise in gross order value in Dec quarter.
Swiggy saw slightly slower growth at 20.5%, both exceeding 20% after several quarters.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd partners with OpenAI to enhance AI across Zomato, Blinkit, and its ecosystem.
The collaboration includes AI-assisted workflows, partner upskilling, and internal automation integration with OpenAI models.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd partners with OpenAI to enhance AI across Zomato, Blinkit, and its ecosystem.

news.title: Eternal shares surged 6%, hitting a three-month high.
news.summary: Eternal shares surged 6%, hitting a three-month high.

news.title:
Deepinder Goyal resigns as CEO, MD, and Director of Eternal Ltd, effective February 1, 2026.
Albinder Dhindsa appointed as new Group CEO; Goyal transitions to Vice Chairman role focusing on strategy and ethics.
news.summary:
Deepinder Goyal resigns as CEO, MD, and Director of Eternal Ltd, effective February 1, 2026.
Albinder Dhindsa appointed as new Group CEO; Goyal transitions to Vice Chairman role focusing on strategy and ethics.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd dissolved its step-down subsidiary Zomato Netherlands B.V. on Jan 27, 2026.
Dissolution confirmation was received on Feb 5, 2026, per Eternal Ltd's website.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd dissolved its step-down subsidiary Zomato Netherlands B.V. on Jan 27, 2026.
Dissolution confirmation was received on Feb 5, 2026, per Eternal Ltd's website.

news.title:
Sensex closes 78 points higher; Nifty stays above 23,750 levels.
Eternal jumps 5%, Trent also rises 5% during market session.
news.summary:
Sensex closes 78 points higher; Nifty stays above 23,750 levels.
Eternal jumps 5%, Trent also rises 5% during market session.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd, formerly Zomato, shared its Q3FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting Blinkit's breakeven and 90 bps margin expansion despite competitive intensity.
Management addressed competition's impact on growth, store throughput decline, and plans for long-term margin expansion to 5-6% of NOV, ensuring operational adaptability.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd, formerly Zomato, shared its Q3FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting Blinkit's breakeven and 90 bps margin expansion despite competitive intensity.
Management addressed competition's impact on growth, store throughput decline, and plans for long-term margin expansion to 5-6% of NOV, ensuring operational adaptability.

news.title:
Sensex drops 300 points; Nifty slips below 25,200. Eternal among top laggards.
IndiGo and Axis Bank also feature as leading laggards in market downturn.
news.summary:
Sensex drops 300 points; Nifty slips below 25,200. Eternal among top laggards.

news.title:
ICICI Securities expects Zomato's Q3 PAT to drop 43.6% YoY to Rs. 99.3 cr.
Zomato's net sales may rise 208.1% YoY to Rs. 17,700.6 cr, EBITDA up 1.2% YoY.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities expects Zomato's Q3 PAT to drop 43.6% YoY to Rs. 99.3 cr.
Zomato's net sales may rise 208.1% YoY to Rs. 17,700.6 cr, EBITDA up 1.2% YoY.

news.title:
Eternal Ltd shares jumped 7.5% after CEO Deepinder Goyal's exit.
The stock reached a six-week high post the Q3 results announcement.
news.summary:
Eternal Ltd shares jumped 7.5% after CEO Deepinder Goyal's exit.

news.title:
Eternal expects higher CapEx per store due to automation and larger formats.
Net working capital days to remain at 18; targeting ROCE above 40%.

news.title:
Eternal maintains $3B NOV guidance for District business by FY30, implying 30%+ CAGR.
Growth is driven by increased market share expansion over the next four years.

news.title:

They remain confident in achieving 5%-6% of NOV margins in the long term.
